emails.subject: Re: Transwestern Weekly Report
emails.body: Re: Transwestern Weekly Report Kern River's throughput to CA was only 59%? Did they have an outage? Is the remaining gas dropping-off before CA? We usually assume in our gas flows analysis that Kern is 100% full. This seems unusual. Christine Stokes 09/15/2000 08:46 AM

emails.subject: Re: Transwestern Weekly Report
emails.body: Re: Transwestern Weekly Report Kern River's throughput to CA was only 59%? Did they have an outage? Is the remaining gas dropping-off before CA? We usually assume in our gas flows analysis that Kern is 100% full. This seems unusual. Christine Stokes 09/15/2000 08:46 AM

emails.subject: Re: Transwestern Weekly Report
emails.body: Lindy We receive a report from IGS which does track the California deliveries of Kern River. The remaining volumes, and we do assume that Kern River is 100% full, does get dropped off to the Nevada market. Sometimes, the California deliveries are as low as 325 MMcf/d, which does indicate a strong Las Vegas/Nevada market demand. Lindy Donoho 09/15/2000 11:11 AM
